summary: First testing pass for DRC Plant Hire & Sand landing page. 8/8 pytest backend tests pass (health, quote create/list, validation). Frontend loads correctly; all sections (hero, marquee, about, fleet, sand, why-us, pricing, contact, footer) visible; nav anchor scroll + mobile menu work; hero CTAs navigate to #contact and #fleet; pricing table shows all 5 rows with correct amounts (R1 100.00 / R1 200.00); fleet shows all 4 machines; footer shows all contact details. Quote form: empty-submit shows inline errors for name/phone/location; invalid email shows error; valid submit shows success toast and resets the form; sticky call button appears after scroll. Backend correctly returns email_sent=false (Resend API key intentionally empty) and persists quote to MongoDB. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty per spec; recommend adding a TODO note when key is provisioned to also verify SENDER_EMAIL domain in Resend.
Backend uses `@app.on_event('shutdown')` which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
Contact form deletes payload.email when empty before POSTing — good. Form also strips whitespace via .trim() in validation only; backend Pydantic accepts plain strings so this is fine.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed quote rows in MongoDB collection 'quote_requests' for sorting/persistence assertions. Safe to leave or purge by prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_drc_api.py — pytest-compatible, includes Create→GET persistence check and validation cases. PRICING amounts in /app/frontend/src/data/content.js use 'R1 100.00' format (with non-breaking visual space). When verifying pricing in playwright, search for 'R1 100.00' / 'R1 200.00' exactly. Mobile menu only renders below md breakpoint; set viewport to 390x844 before clicking [data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle]. Resend API key remains empty by design; email_sent=false is expected, not a bug.
